# freeipa_host (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA host.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fqdn` (String) Fully Qualified Domain Name (FQDN) of the host.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the host.
- `id` (String) Unique FQDN of the host.
